PDF_FOLDER.description: The folder to watch for new PDFs. This variable is required.

CLAUDE_VISION_API_KEY.description: An optional ANTHROPIC API key with access to Claude vision. If set, Claude vision will be used for PDF conversion, which can handle scanned PDFs. If not set, a fallback method will be used that works well for text-based PDFs but may omit scanned/image-only pages.
